main_sections.title: The Sky — Picture Reading
main_sections.picture_story_summary: A busy street scene depicting daily life in an Indian town or village. On both sides of the street are shops — a clothing store ('Vastra Style'), a grocery store, a food stall ('Good Meals'), and a fruit vendor. A bullock cart loaded with sacks moves along the road. A man on a bicycle rides past. A woman in a green sari walks with a small dog on a leash. A herd of goats crosses the street. Children share ice golas (coloured ice treats). A man in dark glasses carries a white cane. Two dustbins — one blue, one green — stand near the food stall. A cat sits on a rooftop near a 'Study Point' board. Birds, including coloured ones, fly in the sky above with a kite and a rainbow. The scene celebrates everyday community life, diversity of occupations, and environmental awareness (two-coloured dustbins for waste segregation).

tasks_verbatim.task_text:
Look at the picture and answer.
1. What can you see on both sides of the street?
2. Why are there two dustbins? Do you know why one is blue and the other is green in colour?
3. Why is the man in dark glasses holding a white stick?
4. Do you know which toy the boys are playing with?
5. How many bullock-carts are there in the picture?
6. Name the different animals in the picture.

question_bank.stem: What can you see on both sides of the street?
Why are there two dustbins? Do you know why one is blue and the other is green in colour?
Why is the man in dark glasses holding a white stick?
Do you know which toy the boys are playing with?
How many bullock-carts are there in the picture?
Name the different animals in the picture.

visual_stimulus.brief_description: Large busy street scene with shops, a bullock cart, bicycle, goat herd, children with golas, man with white cane, two dustbins, a kite and rainbow in the sky, birds, and a cat on a rooftop

tasks_verbatim.task_text:
Look at the picture and answer. [Oral discussion of the busy street scene — observation and sharing of personal experience linked to the street.]
[Teacher prompt: Provide ample time to foster the skill of observation.]

question_bank.stem: Look at the picture of the busy street. What do you notice? What is happening? Have you seen a market street like this?
